citation: Bethe ansatz thermodynamic-limit result e_inf = 1/4 - ln(2) for the spin-1/2 antiferromagnetic Heisenberg chain.
notes: Finite open-boundary E/N is expected to approach this trend reference with boundary corrections; it is not a strict finite-N target.

citation: Open-chain single-particle levels epsilon_k = -2 t cos(k pi/(N+1)); many-body ground state fills negative levels.
notes: Used as a small-N analytic trend/reference for the V=0 limit.

citation: At U=0 the Hubbard chain reduces to two spin species of open-chain free fermions.
notes: Used as a quick literature/analytic sanity reference; interacting finite-N cases use ED only for small N.
